name: marshal
description: The control plane for AI coding agents. Drive a fleet of headless workers (Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, Antigravity, Claude Code, Command Code) from one driver: each task runs isolated in its own git worktree, in parallel, with per-provider cost tracking and measured routing benchmarks. Bundles the marshal-orchestrate, marshal-benchmark, marshal-workflow, marshal-review-gate, and marshal-plan-consensus skills plus the Marshal MCP server (17 tools, multi-workspace: one server drives several repos, registered in ~/.marshal/workspaces.yaml).
